tasks.title: ADR: Task.RenderContext parameterless refactoring
tasks.body: Write an ADR documenting the decision to refactor Task.RenderContext from (nodeAddr, nodeDir) parameters to a parameterless signature that strips filesystem I/O and defers it to ContextBuilder. Cover the motivation (separation of domain rendering from filesystem concerns), alternatives considered, and consequences. Addresses audit gap gap-render-context-methods-1. Reference: internal/state/render.go:20.

tasks.title: ADR: NodeState.RenderContext phantom taskID parameter
tasks.body: Write an ADR documenting the decision to include a taskID parameter in NodeState.RenderContext that is not used in the method body. The parameter exists for future caller pairing. Cover why the parameter was included preemptively, the tradeoff of a slightly misleading API surface vs. avoiding a breaking change later, and when the parameter is expected to become load-bearing. Addresses audit gap gap-render-context-methods-2. Reference: internal/state/render.go:97.

tasks.title: Spec: Rendering contract for RenderContext methods
tasks.description: Spec: Rendering contract for RenderContext methods
tasks.body: Write a spec documenting the rendering contract formed by the three RenderContext methods (Task, NodeState, AuditState). The spec must cover: output format and section ordering for each method, edge-case behavior (empty fields omitted, breadcrumb cap of 10, reference inlining size threshold of 8000 bytes), division of responsibility between domain-side rendering and ContextBuilder composition, and how the three outputs are assembled into a final iteration context. Addresses audit gap gap-render-context-methods-3.

tasks.title: Fix audit gaps and unblock render-context-methods
tasks.description: Fix audit gaps and unblock render-context-methods
tasks.body: After the ADRs and spec are written: (1) run 'wolfcastle audit fix-gap gap-render-context-methods-1 --node domain-repository-architecture/repositories/render-context-methods', (2) fix-gap gap-render-context-methods-2, (3) fix-gap gap-render-context-methods-3. Then the render-context-methods audit can be re-triggered to verify the gaps are resolved.

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Render Context Documentation is complete and correct

breadcrumbs.text: Wrote ADR documenting Task.RenderContext parameterless refactoring: motivation (separate domain rendering from filesystem I/O), three alternatives considered, consequences for test simplification and pipeline consolidation.

Wrote ADR documenting the decision to retain the phantom taskID parameter on NodeState.RenderContext: parameter reserved for ContextBuilder consolidation, tradeoff of misleading API surface vs. avoiding future breaking change, with explicit sunset condition if consolidation never materializes.
Committed ADR documenting the phantom taskID parameter on NodeState.RenderContext: parameter reserved for ContextBuilder consolidation, tradeoff analysis of three options, explicit sunset condition.

Wrote spec documenting the rendering contract for all three RenderContext methods: section ordering, edge-case behavior (empty-field omission, breadcrumb cap of 10, reference inlining threshold of 8000 bytes), division of responsibility between domain rendering and ContextBuilder, and final prompt assembly.

Wrote and committed spec documenting the rendering contract for all three RenderContext methods and ContextBuilder assembly: section ordering, edge-case behavior (empty-field omission, breadcrumb cap of 10, reference inlining threshold of 8000 bytes), division of responsibility, and composite prompt structure.

Fixed all three audit gaps on render-context-methods node (gap-render-context-methods-1, -2, -3) now that ADRs and spec documenting the RenderContext design decisions and rendering contract are committed.

Fixed all three audit gaps on render-context-methods (gap-render-context-methods-1, -2, -3) and added cross-reference section to the rendering contract spec documenting which documents resolved which gaps.

Audit: added missing numbered ADR 079 (phantom taskID) to docs/decisions/ and INDEX, fixed duplicate Status/Date headers in .wolfcastle ADR copies. Build, tests, formatting, vet, race detector all clean. All prior gaps resolved. Code correctness verified.

audit.result_summary: Documented all RenderContext design decisions and rendering contracts. Produced ADR 078 (Task.RenderContext parameterless refactoring), ADR 079 (NodeState.RenderContext phantom taskID parameter), and a spec covering section ordering, edge-case behavior, and the division of responsibility between domain rendering and ContextBuilder assembly. Resolved three audit gaps (gap-render-context-methods-1 through -3) on the sibling render-context-methods node. Audit verified build, tests, formatting, vet, and race detector all clean; added the missing numbered ADR 079 entry and fixed duplicate headers in wolfcastle-managed ADR copies.
